channel.title: Digg AI Feed from X
channel.description: Top 10 AI stories from Digg's X-ranked tech feed with click-through links to original source content.

item.title: AI startup Etched exits stealth with $800M in funding for its Sohu chip, which hardcodes LLM attention into silicon
item.description: The company has secured over $1 billion in contracts.
item.content:encoded:
The company has secured over $1 billion in contracts.

Original source: https://x.com/Etched/status/2071972062202343590

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/lnyilbgg

Etched has stepped out of stealth with $800 million raised across multiple rounds to advance its Sohu ASIC, a chip built specifically for transformer-based LLM inference, while also reporting more than $1 billion in customer contracts and plans to ship its first full inference racks this summer after a completed A0 tapeout. 71 572 36 107 70K ID #1972 | @IAINDUNNING SO #1919 | @CIS_FEMALE AG #1848 | @ITSANDREWGAO MP #1819 | @MVPATEL2000 DZ #1794 | @DZHANG50 LA #1783 | @LIORONAI NA #1761 | @NIKESHARORA BT #1605 | @BENTOSSELL MB #1589 | @BAKKERMICHIEL SW #1516 | @0XSIGIL LP #1442 | @LPOLOVETS CH #1360 | @KIMMONISMUS JS #1313 | @JOON_S_PK LA #1215 | @SCALING01 JH #1190 | @MATHEMAGIC1AN YP #1171 | @YPATIL125 EL #1136 | @ELIEBAKOUCH SH #1085 | @SONYATWEETYBIRD TS #1050 | @TIMSWEENEYEPIC DR #981

  • Views: 56,367
  • Likes: 364
  • Bookmarks: 74
  • Quotes: 2
  • Replies: 56
  • Posts: 52

Top authors

  • Tim Rocktäschel
  • rohan anil
  • Tri Dao
  • Stefano Ermon
  • Jerry Tworek
I’m a very early investor in Etched, as I’ve believed for years that inference will be the biggest market we’ve ever seen. Incredibly impressed by the team’s execution and so excited to use models powered by their hardware!

item.title: US Commerce Department is expected to lift export controls on Fable technology on July 1, 2026
item.description: Creators Matthew Berman and Dan Shipper plan immediate live testing
item.content:encoded:
Creators Matthew Berman and Dan Shipper plan immediate live testing

Original source: https://www.politico.com/news/2026/06/30/anthropic-wh-lifting-export-limits-00980865

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/aypwilha

The Commerce Department move would reverse the June export controls that forced Anthropic to shut down Claude Fable 5 worldwide after launch, restoring the model to general availability without the foreign-national restrictions that had blocked everyone including US users. 2.1K 10K 1.6K 875 582.1K “P #1846 | @PAULARAMBLES MB #1780 | @MATTHEWBERMAN BH #1762 | @BENHYLAK ZE #1695 | @ZEPHYR_Z9 AV #1419 | @ALTRYNE CH #1360 | @KIMMONISMUS T- #1325 | @THEO RP #1257 | @ROHANPAUL_AI LA #1215 | @SCALING01 BA #1115 | @BAYESLORD 🎭 #1014 | @DEEPFATES DS #975 | @DANSHIPPER HE #708 | @HEINRICHKUTTLER MS #691 | @MATTSHUMER_ AC #682 | @ANDREWCURRAN_ TM #613 | @ISCIENCELUVR BT #593 | @TUNGUZ YJ #586 | @YUCHENJ_UW B( #530 | @BEFFJEZOS MB #57 | @MILES_BRUNDAGE

  • Views: 121,992
  • Likes: 2,185
  • Bookmarks: 137
  • Quotes: 38
  • Replies: 222
  • Posts: 50

Top authors

  • Miles Brundage
  • Beff (e/acc)
  • Yuchen Jin
  • Bojan Tunguz
  • Tanishq Mathew Abraham, Ph.D.
The plan is to Fable 5 available again to all general users. Full story here w/@cheyennehaslett : https://www.politico.com/news/2026/06/30/anthropic-wh-lifting-export-limits-00980865

item.title: Anthropic releases Claude Sonnet 5, scoring 63.2% on SWE-bench Pro and 81.2% on OSWorld computer use
item.description: The model features an optional 1-million-token context window.
item.content:encoded:
The model features an optional 1-million-token context window.

Original source: https://www.anthropic.com/news/claude-sonnet-5

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/bao6n6us

Anthropic is releasing Claude Sonnet 5 today as its most agentic Sonnet model, with improved planning, browser and terminal tool use, and autonomous task execution that previously needed larger models. Official details highlight gains over Sonnet 4.6 in reasoning and coding while landing close to but generally below Opus 4.8 on evaluations. Reports circulating on social media mention a 1M context window and January 2026 knowledge cutoff, yet these specifics do not appear in the primary announcement or system card. 953 5.7K 675 546 249.4K BR #1861 | @BRIANROEMMELE XL #1855 | @XLR8HARDER FB #1778 | @XEOPHON PS #1578 | @SKIRANO AV #1419 | @ALTRYNE CH #1360 | @KIMMONISMUS RO #1315 | @KRISHNANROHIT RP #1257 | @ROHANPAUL_AI LA #1215 | @SCALING01 XJ #830 | @_XJDR RS #741 | @ZIV_RAVID EL #684 | @O

  • Views: 78,597
  • Likes: 1,163
  • Bookmarks: 75
  • Quotes: 21
  • Replies: 134
  • Posts: 55

Top authors

  • Aaron Levie
  • Robert Scoble
  • Teortaxes▶️ (DeepSeek 推特🐋铁粉 2023 – ∞)
  • will brown
  • Tanishq Mathew Abraham, Ph.D.
@claudeai Pricing is dope!

item.title: Neuralink completes first human through-dura electrode insertion, bypassing the need to cut the brain's protective membrane
item.description: The milestone procedure was performed at Toronto's University Health Network.
item.content:encoded:
The milestone procedure was performed at Toronto's University Health Network.

Original source: https://x.com/neuralink/status/2072026718467166512

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/vadfob6e

Neuralink has now threaded its electrode arrays straight through the intact dura mater in human trial participants, leaving the brain's tough outer membrane uncut for the first time. The approach skips a traditional scalpel step, which Elon Musk described as solving a key challenge and making procedures notably safer and simpler. 924 4.3K 554 176 1.3M MS #585 | @MARTINSHKRELI RS #447 | @SCOBLEIZER SZ #303 | @SHIVON EM #52 | @ELONMUSK

  • Views: 1,316,464
  • Likes: 4,291
  • Bookmarks: 176
  • Quotes: 45
  • Replies: 879
  • Posts: 7

Top authors

  • Elon Musk
  • Shivon Zilis
  • Robert Scoble
  • Martin Shkreli
@shivon @cb_doge Absolutely

item.title: Google DeepMind launches Nano Banana 2 Lite for $0.034 images and previews Gemini Omni Flash API
item.description: Omni Flash generates 10-second videos at $0.10 per second.
item.content:encoded:
Omni Flash generates 10-second videos at $0.10 per second.

Original source: https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/models-and-research/gemini-models/gemini-omni-flash-nano-banana-2-lite/

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/plr69ybe

Google DeepMind is rolling out Nano Banana 2 Lite as a generally available image model that handles generation and editing in roughly four seconds while Gemini Omni Flash enters preview for conversational video work inside the Gemini API and AI Studio. 171 994 176 173 155.6K FO #1853 | @FOFRAI AV #1419 | @ALTRYNE PS #1404 | @_PHILSCHMID RP #1257 | @ROHANPAUL_AI EL #684 | @OMARSAR0 T( #501 | @TEORTAXESTEX 👩‍💻P #387 | @DYNAMICWEBPAIGE PM #317 | @DOCMILANFAR JB #245 | @JASONBALDRIDGE LK #100 | @OFFICIALLOGANK DH #29 | @DEMISHASSABIS

  • Views: 17,206
  • Likes: 217
  • Bookmarks: 39
  • Quotes: 10
  • Replies: 42
  • Posts: 16

Top authors

  • Demis Hassabis
  • Logan Kilpatrick
  • Jason Baldridge
  • Peyman Milanfar
  • 👩‍💻 Paige Bailey
Nano Banana 2 Lite delivers text-to-image outputs in just 4 seconds. It’s designed for quicker ideation and workflows where speed and cost are the primary roadblocks.

item.title: Ramp and Revelio Labs study of 21,559 firms finds high-intensity AI adopters grew headcount by 10% over two years
item.description: Entry-level headcount at those high-adopting firms rose 12%.
item.content:encoded:
Entry-level headcount at those high-adopting firms rose 12%.

Original source: https://ramp.com/data/ai-jobs-impact

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/o8ls9tj2

The Ramp-Revelio analysis tracks actual vendor spending on AI tools against monthly workforce records for 21,559 U.S. firms from 2021 through early 2026. Companies in the top tercile of AI intensity added staff steadily after adoption, while lower-intensity spenders showed no measurable shift, with entry-level roles expanding fastest among the heavier users. 27 109 629 37 22.8K RN #1992 | @RAMEZ DJ #1706 | @DAN_JEFFRIES1 CB #1674 | @CODE_STAR TN #1157 | @TURNERNOVAK CV #659 | @C_VALENZUELAB SI #584 | @SIGNULLL KR #384 | @RABOIS NB #353 | @NATHANBENAICH AL #195 | @LEVIE DS #192 | @DAVIDSACKS YL #3 | @YLECUN

  • Views: 23,116
  • Likes: 80
  • Bookmarks: 21
  • Quotes: 1
  • Replies: 20
  • Posts: 16

Top authors

  • Yann LeCun
  • David Sacks
  • Aaron Levie
  • Nathan Benaich
  • Keith Rabois
Sources: Study: https://ramp.com/data/ai-jobs-impact Charts: https://www.ft.com/content/8026eac6-16ad-467d-b8c3-c48c5af684e6?syn-25a6b1a6=1

item.title: Visa, Stripe, and Coinbase back Open Standard's upcoming OpenUSD stablecoin designed to share economics with users
item.description: Tempo will natively issue the stablecoin on day one.
item.content:encoded:
Tempo will natively issue the stablecoin on day one.

Original source: http://joinopenstandard.com

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/m3fwr9bt

Open Standard is rolling out Open USD as the first stablecoin built explicitly as shared infrastructure rather than a proprietary product, with Visa, Stripe, Coinbase and over 140 other partners signed on to support it. The design centers on neutral governance through an independent company, zero mint or redeem fees, and a commitment to return nearly all reserve earnings to the partners and distributors who drive volume. 61 405 216 41 46.8K DR #1656 | @DWR DM #1132 | @DAVIDMARCUS MH #1108 | @MATTHUANG MP #1028 | @EASTDAKOTA AL #820 | @ALFRED_LIN BA #398 | @BRIAN_ARMSTRONG TL #220 | @TOBI EM #171 | @EMOSTAQUE PC #81 | @PATRICKC PG #39 | @PAULG

  • Views: 42,217
  • Likes: 306
  • Bookmarks: 23
  • Quotes: 2
  • Replies: 51
  • Posts: 15

Top authors

  • Paul Graham
  • Patrick Collison
  • Emad
  • tobi lutke
  • Brian Armstrong
Delighted to partner with Visa, Mastercard, Coinbase, Cloudflare, Google, and many others, to introduce Open Standard, a new stablecoin designed for scale: http://joinopenstandard.com.

item.title: OpenAI internal optimization cuts inference costs by half, running logged-out ChatGPT traffic on a couple hundred GPUs
item.description: Observers speculate the undisclosed method relies on speculative decoding
item.content:encoded:
Observers speculate the undisclosed method relies on speculative decoding

Original source: https://www.theinformation.com/articles/openai-discovers-new-way-cut-inference-costs-half?utm_source=ti_app&rc=hwneun

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/r2e9x85d

OpenAI quietly found an optimization that cuts inference costs in half on the models it touched, and the first visible payoff showed up in logged-out ChatGPT traffic where GPU count dropped to just a few hundred. The work came from engineers squeezing more out of existing servers rather than chasing new chips, a detail that stayed internal until The Information surfaced it. 39 257 28 44 18K DM #1766 | @DAVEMCCLURE CB #1674 | @CODE_STAR CH #1360 | @KIMMONISMUS RP #1257 | @ROHANPAUL_AI LA #1215 | @SCALING01 JL #1086 | @JESSICALESSIN AC #682 | @ANDREWCURRAN_ ⿻A #595 | @IAMTRASK T( #501 | @TEORTAXESTEX NL #80 | @NATOLAMBERT

  • Views: 14,701
  • Likes: 239
  • Bookmarks: 35
  • Quotes: 8
  • Replies: 31
  • Posts: 19

Top authors

  • Nathan Lambert
  • Teortaxes▶️ (DeepSeek 推特🐋铁粉 2023 – ∞)
  • ⿻ Andrew Trask
  • Andrew Curran
  • Jessica Lessin
More on the optimization + what it could mean for OpenAI's gross margins or usage limits here: https://www.theinformation.com/newsletters/ai-agenda/openai-discovers-new-way-cut-inference-costs-half

item.title: Biotech startup Conception successfully generates the first early-stage human eggs derived from stem cells
item.description: The milestone advances in vitro gametogenesis to address infertility.
item.content:encoded:
The milestone advances in vitro gametogenesis to address infertility.

Original source: https://x.com/mattkrisiloff/status/2071963092263768157

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/d7cqlgwk

A blood draw can now yield induced pluripotent stem cells that Conception has coaxed into miniature ovaries holding the first reported early-stage human eggs. This technical step inches in vitro gametogenesis forward for infertility research, yet the cells remain far from mature gametes and carry no verified path to fertilization or live birth. 45 229 27 26 37.4K RN #1992 | @RAMEZ TH #1982 | @VOOOOOOGEL KJ #1971 | @KATIES M🍥 #1956 | @MAYFER MD #1628 | @MHDEMPSEY MP #1028 | @EASTDAKOTA DF #756 | @DANIELLEFONG BA #398 | @BRIAN_ARMSTRONG BP #381 | @BORISMPOWER JA #173 | @JACHIAM0

  • Views: 32,733
  • Likes: 137
  • Bookmarks: 10
  • Replies: 25
  • Posts: 17

Top authors

  • Joshua Achiam
  • Boris Power
  • Brian Armstrong
  • Danielle Fong 🔆
  • Matthew Prince 🌥
This is a huge deal once we can safely start doing it in humans - any cell can be turned into a human egg !

item.title: Sebastian Raschka releases a new book on building reasoning LLMs from scratch
item.description: The guide covers inference scaling, reinforcement learning, and distillation.
item.content:encoded:
The guide covers inference scaling, reinforcement learning, and distillation.

Original source: https://mng.bz/Nwr7

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/23u54olf

Sebastian Raschka follows his earlier LLM pretraining guide with a 440-page full-color volume that starts from an off-the-shelf model and walks through building reasoning capabilities by hand, covering text generation mechanics, verifier evaluation, and post-training methods. 19 156 266 36 5.8K MJ #1433 | @MIMANSAJ EL #1136 | @ELIEBAKOUCH KM #409 | @KORYMATH SR #182 | @RASBT NL #80 | @NATOLAMBERT

  • Views: 5,825
  • Likes: 156
  • Bookmarks: 36
  • Quotes: 4
  • Replies: 15
  • Posts: 9

Top authors

  • Nathan Lambert
  • Sebastian Raschka
  • Kory Mathewson
  • elie
  • Mimansa Jaiswal
It's available from Manning (already shipping): https://mng.bz/Nwr7 and Amazon (for preorder, shipping in a few weeks): https://amzn.to/4aAKiFY
